hooks.command: echo 'AGRI360 PROCESS REMINDER (docs/CLAUDE_PROCESSES.md § 1): Default pipeline for any code-touching prompt: (1) researcher agent produces a written report, (2) build a TaskCreate task list from it, (3) delegate tasks to dev-frontend + dev-backend in parallel, (4) deploy via coolify-dev agent as soon as the dev agents return clean. No local browser verification — user verifies in production. Skip ONLY if the prompt is one of: (a) question/status check, (b) docs/spec/process file edit, (c) explicit "do this inline" instruction, (d) research-only/audit request, (e) trivial cosmetic single-file edit.'
